subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost partake of the outpourings of the Spirit in this witnessed Day! I have read thy wondrous letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المستفیض من فیوضات الروح فی هذا الیوم المشهود انی قرئت تحریرک البدیع
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
